candidate.completion: hold me like my screen time report does: with mounting concern.
candidate.sentence: i’m lonely, please hold me like my screen time report does: with mounting concern.

evaluation.rationale: The turn is clear and logically anchored in "mounting concern," which precisely reframes the plea through self-monitoring rather than comfort. The idea is fresh and readable, but "screen time report" is a bulky vehicle, so the line lands more as a smart contemporary joke than a fully compressed, elegant aphorism.

incumbent_before.sentence: i’m lonely, please put me in a group chat so I can be ignored at scale
